greeting.text: Mind the briars, friend. Bring me pelts and fangs and I'll tan you armor lighter than any smith's iron.

tan.text: Wolf pelts make sturdy vests and leggings. Bring dire-wolf fangs and a troll tooth and I'll craft you a Direhide Cowl fit for a master's hand. Type TAN here and I'll show you my patterns.

hides.text: Wolves roam the clearing to the north; their meaner dire cousins den to the east. Trolls lurk deeper still. Skin what you slay and bring it back to me.

end.text: Keep your leathers oiled and they'll keep you whole.
